event: Still life with fruit, flowers, and a bottle
description: A vibrant still life painted in bold, expressive brushwork. A dark bottle stands at center-left surrounded by various round fruits — green, yellow, and red apples or similar fruit — on a white cloth or table surface. Behind and above, an explosion of colorful flowers in red, white, yellow, and purple fills the upper portion. The palette is rich and saturated with deep blues, fiery reds, vivid greens, and warm yellows. The paint is applied thickly in broken, mosaic-like strokes.
